actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Stealthy pack hunter with exceptional senses
tactical_info.positioning: Uses stealth and superior darkvision for ambushes
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 piercing per hit, minimal damage output
tactical_info.key_abilities: Extended darkvision (90 ft), high stealth and perception
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP and damage, poor STR
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for reconnaissance and early warning systems
